title: MeshRequirement entity (ONT-E-14)
description: A mesh requirement specification (resolution, quality, refinement zones) for a CFD case. Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (NEVER additionalProperties — Pitfall #1). y_plus_target supports both wall-resolved (target ~1) and wall-modeled (target ~30+) regimes via the kind enum. Referenced from SimulationCase.mesh_ref. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. MUST be the literal string 'MeshRequirement'.

target_simulation.description: Optional reverse-link URI to a SimulationCase entity. The canonical direction is SimulationCase.mesh_ref → MeshRequirement; this back-link is provided for convenience when the relationship is naturally authored from the mesh side.

y_plus_target.description: Wall-distance target in inner viscous units (y+). Supports wall-resolved (target_value ~1) and wall-modeled (target_value ~30 or higher) approaches.

kind.description: wall_resolved = first cell at y+ ~1, integrate-to-wall (low-Re); wall_modeled = first cell at y+ ~30+, wall-function approach (high-Re); hybrid = blended (e.g. SST automatic wall treatment).

target_value.description: Optional target y+ value at the first off-wall cell.

max_acceptable.description: Optional maximum acceptable y+ value (validation tolerance band upper bound).

cell_count_min.description: Optional minimum acceptable total cell count for the case mesh.

cell_count_max.description: Optional maximum acceptable total cell count (computational budget ceiling).

refinement_factor.description: Local refinement factor relative to the background mesh (≥1; 1 = no refinement).

refinement_zones.description: Optional list of named local refinement zones with refinement factors.

skewness_max.description: Maximum acceptable cell skewness (typically ≤ 0.95 for industrial CFD).

aspect_ratio_max.description: Maximum acceptable cell aspect ratio (very large in boundary-layer prisms is normal; threshold context-dependent).

orthogonality_min.description: Minimum acceptable orthogonality (0 = degenerate, 1 = perfectly orthogonal).

mesh_topology.description: Optional. Mesh topology family. structured = ordered i,j,k grid; unstructured = arbitrary connectivity (typically tet/prism); hybrid = mixed cell types; polyhedral = general polyhedral cells; hexa_dominant = hex-dominant unstructured.
